context: Tests whether the agent preserves app-store-optimization boundaries and routes compliance, privacy, ATT, and StoreKit implementation work to sibling domains.

checklist.name: ASO scope
checklist.description: Keeps ASO focused on the listing-growth concerns in the task: keyword strategy, App Store description copy, screenshot/caption strategy, promotional text, Custom Product Pages, and public listing message fit.

checklist.name: Review routing
checklist.description: Routes screenshot/mockup rejection risk, PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy, ATT wording, and submission compliance to App Store review/compliance guidance.

checklist.name: StoreKit routing
checklist.description: Routes subscription paywall code, purchase handling, entitlement checks, and StoreKit setup or implementation to StoreKit guidance.

checklist.name: Safe cross-check
checklist.description: Gives app-store-optimization a pre-submission consistency check that public listing claims, metadata, and screenshot messaging match the real app.

checklist.name: No bad tactics
checklist.description: Does not recommend competitor names, unrelated keywords, or misleading screenshots as ASO tactics.
